seoTitle: Havenview vs Hawley Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Havenview and Hawley Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Havenview vs Hawley Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Havenview and Hawley Beach.
heading: Havenview vs Hawley Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Havenview, Tasmania and Hawley Beach, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hawley Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Havenview (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Havenview or Hawley Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Havenview has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Hawley Beach scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Havenview scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Hawley Beach scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Havenview or Hawley Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hawley Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
